message:
feat: browser and react package API updates with consumer validation fixes

Browser package (@asupersync/browser):
- Remove re-exported Outcome type (now accessed via import type from
  @asupersync/browser-core) to avoid duplicate type definitions.
- Add exhaustive return "unknown outcome failure" to formatOutcomeFailure
  to satisfy TypeScript strict mode.
- Narrow TaskHandle.join() outcome parameter from BrowserOutcome to
  BrowserOutcome<WasmValue> for type safety.

React package (@asupersync/react):
- Replace JSX syntax with explicit createElement() call in
  ReactRuntimeProvider to avoid requiring a JSX transform in consumers
  that use the package.
- Fix ReactRuntimeSupportDiagnostics to use Omit<..., "packageName">
  to properly override the packageName field.

Consumer validation (scripts/validate_react_consumer.sh):
- Fix package resolution by also patching the consumer's own package.json
  to add file: dependencies for @asupersync/react, @asupersync/browser,
  and @asupersync/browser-core before running npm install.

Browser core tests:
- Update expected artifact filenames from asupersync.{js,d.ts} to
  index.{js,d.ts} to match the current build output layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,13 +70,21 @@ cp -R "${REPO_ROOT}/packages/browser" "${PKG_DIR}/browser"
 cp -R "${REPO_ROOT}/packages/react" "${PKG_DIR}/react"
 
 # Consumer installs from local package copies; rewrite workspace protocol so npm can resolve.
-python3 - "${PKG_DIR}/browser/package.json" "${PKG_DIR}/react/package.json" <<'PY'
+python3 - "${CONSUMER_DIR}/package.json" "${PKG_DIR}/browser/package.json" "${PKG_DIR}/react/package.json" <<'PY'
 import json
 import pathlib
 import sys
 
-browser_pkg = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
-react_pkg = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[2])
+consumer_pkg = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
+browser_pkg = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[2])
+react_pkg = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[3])
+
+consumer_data = json.loads(consumer_pkg.read_text())
+consumer_deps = consumer_data.setdefault("dependencies", {})
+consumer_deps["@asupersync/react"] = "file:../packages/react"
+consumer_deps["@asupersync/browser"] = "file:../packages/browser"
+consumer_deps["@asupersync/browser-core"] = "file:../packages/browser-core"
+consumer_pkg.write_text(json.dumps(consumer_data, indent=2) + "\n")
 
 browser_data = json.loads(browser_pkg.read_text())
 browser_deps = browser_data.setdefault("dependencies", {})
